probability.last_reasoning: Bear case increased from 10% to 14%: XRP at $1.37 is already approaching <$1 territory, RLUSD is contracting, F&G at 10 reflects genuine capital flight, and multiple kill switch data gaps prevent thesis validation. Base case narrowed from 40% to 42% but absorbs some mid-case probability. Mid case adjusted from 38% to 33%: the distance from $1.37 to $8 requires a massive catalyst — institutional evidence is present but on-chain execution metrics are absent or declining. Bull case trimmed from 12% to 11%. The primary driver is RLUSD contraction and extreme fear environment making near-term institutional deployment less likely.

bear_case.score_reasoning: Elevated from prior assessment. RLUSD contraction ($70M loss), XRP price erosion to $1.37, Extreme Fear at 10, and persistent data gaps on ODL/ETF AUM/PermissionedDEX all represent genuine bear pressure. The thesis has strong announcements but weak observable on-chain execution.

competing_infrastructure.name: SWIFT GPI
competing_infrastructure.status_text: SWIFT GPI continues processing 150M+ messages daily with growing same-day settlement rates. Remains the incumbent with network effect advantages that XRPL has not yet dented at scale.

competing_infrastructure.name: Visa B2B Connect
competing_infrastructure.status_text: No significant new enterprise deployments reported. Visa's stablecoin strategy remains fragmented across multiple chains.

competing_infrastructure.name: JPMorgan Kinexys
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Kinexys (formerly Onyx) processes $2B+ daily in JPM Coin transfers. Closed-loop but expanding to interbank — directly competes with XRP's institutional settlement narrative.

competing_infrastructure.name: BIS Project Nexus
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Nexus interlinks national instant payment systems without requiring a blockchain layer. If successfully scaled, it eliminates the pain point XRP is designed to solve. Kill switch #9 remains active — monitor for XRPL-independent operation.

competing_infrastructure.name: Ethereum Institutional
competing_infrastructure.status_text: BlackRock's BUIDL fund ($1.5B+ AUM), JPMorgan's Ethereum-based settlements, and growing L2 institutional adoption represent a credible alternative settlement layer. Ethereum's institutional footprint currently exceeds XRPL's by most on-chain metrics.

bear_case.odl_stagnation: ODL volume data has been unavailable for multiple consecutive runs — the thesis literally cannot prove its core utility metric is growing, and absence of data at this stage is itself a bearish signal.
bear_case.token_velocity_concern: Token velocity data remains UNKNOWN. If XRP is being used primarily as a bridge currency with sub-4-second hold times, price appreciation from utility alone may be structurally limited regardless of volume growth.

macro_headwinds.name: Global Recession Risk
macro_headwinds.status_text: F&G at 10 (Extreme Fear), tariff uncertainty, and Japan approaching stress thresholds collectively signal elevated recession probability. Institutional crypto adoption typically decelerates in recessionary environments.

macro_headwinds.name: Crypto Winter Signals
macro_headwinds.status_text: XRP down 3.1% to $1.37 with Extreme Fear. Not yet a confirmed winter but sustained sub-$1.50 trading with contracting stablecoin metrics would constitute early winter signals.

macro_headwinds.name: Regulatory Reversal Risk
macro_headwinds.status_text: Clarity Act pending but 7 spot ETFs are live and SEC posture appears stable. Low near-term reversal risk, though legislative progress has stalled.

macro_headwinds.name: Rate Hike Extension
macro_headwinds.status_text: US 10Y at 4.02% suggests markets are not pricing aggressive cuts. If Fed holds or hikes due to tariff-driven inflation, risk assets including crypto face sustained headwinds.

bear_case.bear_narrative: The institutional settlement thesis is under structural assault from multiple directions: banks are building production-scale tokenized deposit systems (Kinexys $2B+/day, Fnality BOE-approved) that explicitly bypass crypto bridge assets, while the thesis's core evidence — ODL volume — is completely unverifiable and three of five kill switches are at DANGER status. Five critical blind spots were discovered in this sweep, all negative, revealing that the competitive landscape is far more hostile than the thesis framework was tracking. REDUCE EXPOSURE immediately; the bull case rests on internally-generated confidence labels while the bear case is built on observable market reality.
